name: rivers-of-bangladesh-workspace
description: Full-stack 3D Bangladesh River Path Explorer with React, Cesium, and Express/SQLite

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.cpSync('frontend/dist', 'dist', {recursive: true});"
